verses.text: Remember not, O God, the sins of long ago; in tender mercy visit us, distressed and humbled low.
O Lord, our Savior, help, and glorify your name; deliver us from all our sins and take away our shame.
In your compassion hear your pris'ner's plaintive sigh, and in the greatness of your pow'r save those about to die.
Then, safe within your fold, we will exalt your name; our thankful hearts with songs of joy your goodness will proclaim.
